actual_limiting_reason: Functional decoder stage translated a static-shape prefill-only forge emit and validated prefill through seq_len 64 in this pass; downstream stages must extend and revalidate longer context.

capacity_evidence.checker_compatibility_note: No device-DRAM capacity limit is claimed for this functional-decoder pass. The context reduction is a stage validation limit; this field is present because .agents/scripts/check_context_contract.py currently requires capacity_evidence whenever supported context is below the HF target.

evidence.result: 12 passed, 1 skipped in 65.83s; watcher attached/detached cleanly across all four local Blackhole devices and reported no errors.

evidence.output: Context contract OK for models/autoports/qwen_qwen3_4b: target=40960, supported=64 (DRAM-limited).

notes: This context reduction is a functional starting-point validation limit, not a claimed hard DRAM or model limit.
The functional decoder remains a prefill-only starting point; optimized-decoder adds a single-chip paged prefill/decode path validated at the same advertised current_supported_context.
Optimized-decoder keeps KV cache dtype BF16 and does not reduce the current supported context of 64.
RoPE tables and causal masks are rebuilt during decoder setup for the requested max_seq_len instead of copying the forge seq_len=16 constants.
